sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْقِطَارَاتُ السَّرِيعَةُ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ مُنَافِسًا قَوِيًّا لِلرِّحْلَاتِ الْجَوِيَّةِ الْقَصِيرَةِ الْمَدَى.
sentences.translation: Brzi vozovi su u posljednje vrijeme postali snažan konkurent kratkim letovima.
sentences.translationEn: High-speed trains have recently become a strong competitor to short-haul flights.

sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ هَذِهِ الْقِطَارَاتُ بِتَوْفِيرِ رَاحَةٍ أَكْبَرَ لِلْمُسَافِرِينَ، حَيْثُ يُمْكِنُهُمُ التَّحَرُّكُ بِحُرِّيَّةٍ وَالِاسْتِمْتَاعُ بِالْمَنَاظِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi vozovi se odlikuju pružanjem veće udobnosti putnicima, jer se mogu slobodno kretati i uživati u prirodnim pejzažima.
sentences.translationEn: These trains are characterized by providing greater comfort for passengers, as they can move freely and enjoy the natural scenery.

sentences.arabic: بِالْإِضَافَةِ إِلَى ذَلِكَ، تَقَعُ مَحَطَّاتُ الْقِطَارِ عَادَةً فِي مَرَاكِزِ الْمُدُنِ، مِمَّا يُوَفِّرُ الْوَقْتَ الْمُسْتَغْرَقَ فِي التَّنَقُّلِ مِنَ الْمَطَارَاتِ الْبَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pored toga, željezničke stanice se obično nalaze u centrima gradova, što štedi vrijeme utrošeno na prevoz sa udaljenih aerodroma.
sentences.translationEn: In addition, train stations are usually located in city centers, which saves time spent commuting from distant airports.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ مَنْظُورٍ بِيئِيٍّ، تُعَدُّ السِّكَكُ الْحَدِيدِيَّةُ أَقَلَّ تَلْوِيثًا لِلْغِلَافِ الْجَوِيِّ مُقَارَنَةً بِالطَّائِرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Iz ekološke perspektive, željeznice manje zagađuju atmosferu u poređenju sa avionima.
sentences.translationEn: From an environmental perspective, railways are less polluting to the atmosphere compared to airplanes.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، لَا تَزَالُ الطَّائِرَاتُ هِيَ الْخِيَارَ الْأَمْثَلَ لِلْمَسَافَاتِ الطَّوِيلَةِ وَعَبْرَ الْقَارَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, avioni ostaju idealan izbor za duge i prekookeanske relacije.
sentences.translationEn: However, planes remain the ideal choice for long distances and transcontinental travel.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى الِاخْتِيَارُ بَيْنَهُمَا مُعْتَمِدًا عَلَى التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ السُّرْعَةِ وَالتَّكْلُفَةِ وَالرَّاحَةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Izbor između njih ostaje zavisan od ravnoteže između brzine, cijene i lične udobnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The choice between them remains dependent on the balance between speed, cost, and personal comfort.
